context_key: Check if New Pages Found node
title: Loop stops prematurely due to unconnected false path
symptom: The loop processing multiple URLs stops after 5 items and does not proceed to the done branch.
applies_when: Using a loop to process multiple items
Check if New Pages Found node is part of the workflow
not_this_if: The loop processes all items without stopping
The false path is already connected
root_cause: The loop in n8n requires both true and false paths to be connected for proper execution. If the false path is not connected, the loop may terminate prematurely when it encounters a condition that leads to the false path.
fix_steps: Locate the Check if New Pages Found node
Connect the false path of this node back to the loop
Save the workflow and re-run it
agent_instruction: Connect the false path of the Check if New Pages Found node to the loop and save the workflow.
